//:
Typecheck-only config for the standalone bench CLI (bench/run.ts), which imports air-ts by RELATIVE SOURCE path (so it runs under tsx). It cannot be typechecked by the agent's tsconfig.test.json (that would pull air-ts source under the agent rootDir). Run: tsc -p bench/tsconfig.check.json.

Workspaces refactor (issue #85): the fast-xml-parser sub-alias is gone -- npm workspaces hoist a single copy. The air-ts source path stays because run.ts imports by relative source path AND prompts.ts uses the bare specifier at typecheck time.
